The health benefits of Syngonanthus cuyabensis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
